IsBoolean()

Indicates true if current token is a property value or array value of boolean type.

virtual bool IsBoolean()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsEndOfArray()

Indicates true if current token is ']'.

virtual bool IsEndOfArray()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsEndOfObject()

Indicates true if current token is '}'.

virtual bool IsEndOfObject()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsNull()

Indicates true if current token is a property value or array value and equals to null.

virtual bool IsNull()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsNumber()

Indicates true if current token is a property value or array value of numeric type.

virtual bool IsNumber()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsStartOfArray()

Indicates true if current token is '['.

virtual bool IsStartOfArray()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsStartOfObject()

Indicates true if current token is '{'.

virtual bool IsStartOfObject()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsString()

Indicates true if current token is a property value or array value of type string.

virtual bool IsString()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ParseJSONString(string)

Parses JSON string into memory. Returns either IJSONObject or IJSONArray in a 'root' parameter. Doesn't change state of existing IJSONReader2 instance.

virtual object ParseJSONString(string json)

Parameters

json string

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

Read()

Reads next JSON token.

virtual void Read()

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReadFrom(IStream) 

virtual void ReadFrom(IStream inputStream)

Parameters

inputStream IStream

ReadFromString(string)

Specifies input as string.

virtual void ReadFromString(string Text)

Parameters

Text string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReadPropertyName()

Obtains property name. Advances to the next token.

virtual string ReadPropertyName()

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReadValue()

Obtains array or property value as Variant. Advances to the next token.

virtual object ReadValue()

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReadValueAsBoolean()

Obtains array or property value as boolean. Advances to the next token. If property value cannot be coerced to boolean, returns E_FAIL.

virtual bool ReadValueAsBoolean()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReadValueAsDate()

Obtains property or array value as date. Advances to the next token. If property value cannot be coerced to datetime, returns E_FAIL.

virtual DateTime ReadValueAsDate()

Returns

DateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReadValueAsDouble()

Obtains property or array value as number. Advances to the next token. If property value cannot be coerced to double, returns E_FAIL.

virtual double ReadValueAsDouble()

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReadValueAsLong()

Obtains property or array value as number. Advances to the next token. If property value cannot be coerced to long, returns E_FAIL.

virtual int ReadValueAsLong()

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReadValueAsString()

Obtains property or array value as string. Advances to the next token. If property value cannot be coerced to string, returns E_FAIL.

virtual string ReadValueAsString()

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReadValueEx(out object, out int)

Obtains array or property value as Variant along with precision if it is a double. Advances to the next token.

virtual void ReadValueEx(out object pVal, out int precision)

Parameters

pVal object
precision int

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveAllBookmarks()

Removes all bookmarks.

virtual void RemoveAllBookmarks()

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveBookmark(string)

Moves the reader back to a token that has a bookmark with the given name.

virtual void RemoveBookmark(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReturnToBookmark(string)

Moves the reader back to a token that has a bookmark with the given name.

virtual void ReturnToBookmark(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetBookmark(string)

Creates a bookmark on the current token and assigns it a name. Only works if you use ReadFromString(), otherwise returns E_FAIL.

virtual void SetBookmark(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SkipUntilArrayEnds()

Skips the rest of the current object, including closing bracket.

virtual void SkipUntilArrayEnds()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SkipUntilObjectEnds()

Skips the rest of the current object, including closing bracket.

virtual void SkipUntilObjectEnds()
